div.div: Commented on #1 is it still working?
Interesting. While we can't verify if this particular cheat got you banned (as you seem to have experience with other cheats), you are the first to report a ban on this repo! 🏆
Commented on #1 is it still working?
It should still work. Ban is unlikely but I wouldn't recommend using it in a real game anyways. There's always a chance they can ban you.
